metadata.document_title: Unjani Clinic Network — MSA Savings Schedule
metadata.currency: ZAR (Rands, VAT treatment as per source register)
basis: MSA service fee: R450.00 per clinic per month (fixed) for CircleTel managed connectivity
Monthly saving = current ISP monthly cost − R450.00 MSA fee
Savings exclude ThinkWiFi revenue share, reported separately under thinkwifi.est_monthly_revenue_share_rands
sources: Unjani_Clinic_Network_Complete_Register_v3_1.json (27 April 2026) — clinic, contact and current ISP cost data
Unjani Clinics Hybrid Connectivity Solution v3.0 — R450 per site client fee under master agreement
notes: 24 clinics have no current ISP cost data; savings cannot be calculated and are flagged no_cost_data
Clinics flagged cost_increase currently pay less than R450 p/m; the MSA value case there is service quality, SLA and ThinkWiFi revenue, not cost reduction
